scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build crates/core --target bundler --out-dir pkg && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='scripts/cf_core_bg.d.ts';const dst='crates/core/pkg/cf_core_bg.d.ts';if(fs.existsSync(src))fs.copyFileSync(src,dst)"
scripts.dev: npm run build:wasm && wrangler pages dev pages --port 8788 -- wrangler dev --port 8787
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run typecheck
scripts.deploy: npm run build:wasm && node scripts/deploy-worker.mjs && node scripts/deploy-pages.mjs
